metadata.title:
BUSINESS MEN ON


JAUNT TO WENATCHEE

pages.raw_text:
A delegation of rs business men
of Spokane left last night in a spe-
cial Pullman car to attend the state
horticultural convention at We
natchee.


Among the delegates was L. Nc
Lean, formerly of Wenatchee, who is
largely interested in a new irrigation
project in the Methow region. The
gentlemen who accompanied Mr. Nc
Lean will spend few days investi-
eating the project and If the prelimi-
nary surveys show the present esti-
mates to be correct, Mr.. Mclean is
assured that plenty of money will be
forthcoming from Spokane capital
lists to carry the scheme through.


Besides Mr.. Mclean, the delegates
included F. <. Goodall, president of
the chamber of commerce.; A. l..
White. ]. Grier Long, w. w. Green
wood, A. w .Hadley, Phil T. Becher,
Colonel p Nolan, Cyrus Happy, C. H.
Knapp, M. B. Garrett, J. d. Johnson,
C. E. Beetle, M. S. Russi and A. c..
Edwards.
